raw_text: o pedro montero lópez proactive msc aeronautical engineering student with a strong technical background. aiming for improvement and continuous learning, contributing to a positive working atmosphere. fluent in english. education september 2017 - january 2019 master in aeronautical engineering carlos iii university of madrid fully taught in english. september 2013 - july 2017 bachelor's degree in aeronautical engineering technical university of madrid final grade: 7.4/10 program highlights: eproject management eaerodynamics eaircraft design eaircraft certification eaircraft maintenance eair transport work experience february 2017 - july 2017 internship - unmanned aerial target department sistemas de control remoto s.l. (scr) supported to uat department: procedures standardization, aerodynamics analysis, cad components design with catia and contribution to the design of anew unmanned aerial target (uat). july 2016 internship - eurofighter program spanish air force worked with eurofighter aircraft. fault tracing, programmed maintenance and system assembly in the following sections: eef2000 structure eenvironmental control system (ecs) *ej2000 engines (ml1 : ml2) earms pedro.monlopez@gmail.com +34 669061390 madrid, spain hor w www.linkedin.com/in/pedro-montero skills & competences eleadership: made the marketing decisions of my company in the global management challenge, being responsible for setting product prices or advertising expenditures. etime management: dealt with really tight deadlines in different projects of my master degree. flexibility: always ready to acquire new techniques in order to achieve my goal. took different roles in my internship in scr. eteamwork: plenty of group projects during the master degree. global management challenge also required acting as a team to achieve great results. languages espanish mother tongue eenglish b2 level first certificate in english (university of cambridge) advanced level of english (official school of languages) achievements & certificates global management challenge semifinals international competition where a team has to lead a company so that it can maximize its benefits making decisions in the strategy of the company. -spreadsheet proficiency -decision making -balance sheet national tennis referee interests aircraft maintenance airlines management defence military tennis
